inputDescription: Paste a canonical UUID, URN, braced UUID, or 32-character hexadecimal UUID.
emptyTitle: Paste a UUID to decode it
emptyDescription: The decoder shows structure, time fields when available, and copy-ready number formats.
invalidDescription: Use 32 hexadecimal digits with the standard 8-4-4-4-12 grouping, or paste a URN or braced UUID.
nodeSourceMac: The multicast bit is clear, so this node may represent a MAC address.
nodeSourceRandom: The multicast bit is set, so this node was generated rather than copied from a MAC address.

versionLabels.nil: Nil UUID - all bits are zero
versionLabels.time: Version 1 - Gregorian time and node based
versionLabels.max: Max UUID - all bits are one
